title: Welcome to ESBM3700
content:
Hi everyone,


Hope you all had a relaxing summer and are ready for an exciting Fall semester. Welcome to ESBM3700! Our first meeting is coming up this Thursday, August 21 and I’m looking forward to seeing you all then. In this course, we will work together on a series of core topics in entrepreneurship.


You can find the course info here. We will meet in KOBL 140. If you have any questions, please feel free to email me at sina@colorado.edu.


Will see you all on Thursday at 12:30 pm!


All the best,
Sina
